description_long: This is a modern, multi-level bungalow with a flat roof and a striking geometric design, featuring clean white facades and large glass windows. The structure includes multiple terraces, rooftop gardens, and a prominent blue water feature cascading from the upper level into a rectangular swimming pool in the backyard. The property is surrounded by a low fence and set on a manicured green lawn, with paved walkways and a patio area adjacent to the pool. On one side, there are bold, gray structural columns supporting an overhanging section of the building, adding to its contemporary aesthetic. The windows are arranged in horizontal bands, maximizing natural light and offering expansive views. The overall design emphasizes open spaces, outdoor living, and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor environments.
description: A modern, multi-story bungalow with flat roofs, large glass windows, rooftop gardens, and a cascading water feature leading to a backyard pool. The design features geometric lines, open terraces, and bold structural elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, cascading water feature, and the swimming pool with adjacent patio and fenced yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the horizontal window bands, rooftop gardens, and prominent gray support columns under the overhanging section.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the extended terrace, rooftop access, and landscaped garden area with steps and planters.
description_view_3: Opposite side view featuring the pool, patio, and the integration of green spaces with the building's modern lines.
